creator: wietse@porcupine.org
text:
Instead of duplicating Takao TAGAMI's extensive report I will add
two data points and kgdb output. I'm running virtualbox-3.0.51.r22902.

1) It does not panic my uniprocessor laptop (FreeBSD 7.2 i386) where
I use VirtualBox daily.

2) The panic happens, but not always, on my quad-core machine
(FreeBSD 7.1 i386). I have one sample of kgdb output at the end.
This may be a null (function) pointer.

In the case that the machine survives "kldload vboxdrv", I can use
VirtualBox without any trouble.

If more information is needed then I will be happy to share it.

	Wietse

# kgdb -n 1
